creator: shanmugam_s@live.com
text:
Hi Team,

i am facing issue while i am trying install Gnome or running Startx. because 
of Shared object "libxml2.so.5" not found, required by "gconf-sanity-check-2"

Please help......

(==) Log file: "/var/log/Xorg.0.log", Time: Sun Jan  4 21:18:32 2015
(==) Using default built-in configuration (30 lines)
(EE) Failed to load module "vboxvideo" (module does not exist, 0)
(EE) Failed to load module "fbdev" (module does not exist, 0)
failed to set mtrr: Device not configured
Shared object "libxml2.so.5" not found, required by "gconf-sanity-check-2"


root@freebsd:# uname -a
FreeBSD freebsd 10.0-RELEASE-p12 FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE-p12 #0: Tue Nov  4 04:15:03 UTC 2014     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386
